name: Samba TV
description: CTV attribution and measurement platform using ACR chipset data from 24 smart TV brands across 48M addressable devices.

seo.title: Samba TV — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: Samba TV: CTV attribution and measurement platform using ACR chipset data from 24 smart TV brands across 48M addressable devices.

when_to_use: CTV attribution using ACR data from 48M smart TV devices
Cross-screen measurement for linear and streaming ad campaigns
Audience overlap analysis between CTV and mobile campaigns

pros: ACR data from millions of addressable smart TVs
Strong CTV and linear attribution capability
Cross-device extension via panel and partners
Useful for brand and performance TV buyers
cons: Panel limited to supported TV brands
review.verdict: Serious CTV and linear attribution tool, but overlaps little with standard mobile app UA needs.
review.best_for: Brand advertisers investing in linear and CTV who need ACR-based measurement.
review.not_for: App-only advertisers focused on install attribution and SKAN.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
